task.name: asset-inventory

metadata.description: Scan an episode's assets directory and produce a structured inventory of all generated assets with metadata, version tracking, and status.

input.name: assets_directory
input.description: Root assets directory for the episode. Contains subdirectories per scene, each with generated video, narration, frames, and SFX files.

output.description: Structured inventory listing every asset with full metadata.

step.name: Scan Directory Tree
step.description: Recursively scan the episode assets directory to discover all files.

actions.action: Ignore hidden files (.*), .DS_Store, Thumbs.db, and __MACOSX directories
Record the full relative path from the episode root for each file
Map each file to its parent scene directory (extract scene_id from path)
Files directly under assets/ (not in a scene folder) are tagged as "unassigned"

step.name: Classify Asset Types
step.description: Determine the asset type for each file based on extension and naming conventions.

actions.action:
Classification rules by extension and context:
VIDEO: .mp4, .mov, .webm -> "video" NARRATION: .mp3, .wav in narration/ subdirectory or named narration* -> "narration" SFX: .mp3, .wav in sfx/ subdirectory or named sfx* -> "sfx" MUSIC: .mp3, .wav in music/ subdirectory or named music*, bgm* -> "music" FRAME: .png, .jpg, .jpeg, .webp named first-frame*, last-frame*, reference-* -> "frame" IMAGE: .png, .jpg, .jpeg, .webp (other images) -> "frame" SUBTITLE: .srt, .vtt -> "subtitle" METADATA: .json, .yaml, .yml -> "metadata" OTHER: anything else -> "other"

step.name: Extract Version Info
step.description: Detect version numbers from file naming conventions and identify latest versions.

actions.action: For each unique scene_id + asset_type combination: - Identify the highest version number as the "latest" version - Mark all older versions as "superseded"

step.name: Collect File Metadata
step.description: Gather filesystem metadata for each discovered asset.

actions.action: For each file, collect: - file_path: relative path from episode root - file_name: basename - file_size_bytes: raw byte count - file_size_human: human-readable (KB, MB, GB) - created_at: file creation timestamp (ISO-8601) - modified_at: file modification timestamp (ISO-8601)

step.name: Determine Status
step.description: Assign a status to each asset based on markers and cross-references.

actions.action: Status determination rules: - "generated": file exists, is the latest version, no approval/flag marker - "approved": file has .approved marker or is listed in approvals.yaml - "flagged": file has .flagged marker or is listed in flags.yaml - "superseded": a newer version exists for the same scene_id + asset_type - "missing": referenced in scene-spec.yaml but no file found - "corrupt": file exists but has 0 bytes

step.name: Cross-Reference SSD
step.description: Cross-reference against the SSD to identify expected but missing assets.

actions.action: Read episodes/{episode_id}/ssd/scene-spec.yaml (if it exists). For each scene defined in the SSD: - veo scene -> expect at least one video file - imagen/nano-banana frame -> expect image file - chirp/elevenlabs narration -> expect audio file - sfx -> expect sfx audio file Add "missing" entries for expected but not found assets.
If SSD not found, skip missing-asset detection with a warning.

step.name: Compute Summary and Write
step.description: Calculate inventory statistics and write the output file.

actions.action: Compute summary statistics: - total_assets: count of all discovered files - total_size_bytes / total_size_human - by_type: count and size per asset type (video, narration, frame, sfx, music, subtitle, metadata, other) - by_status: count per status (generated, approved, flagged, superseded, missing) - by_scene: asset count and completion percentage per scene_id

error.action: HALT: "Assets directory not found at episodes/{episode_id}/assets/"
Write inventory with zero assets and warning: "Assets directory exists but contains no files."
WARN for that file, mark status as "error", continue scanning remaining files.
WARN: "Scene spec not found -- missing asset detection skipped."
